title: The Meissner Effect — Quantum Levitation Explained
content: The Meissner Effect — Quantum Levitation Explained :root { --bg: #07090f; --surface: #0d1117; --surface2: #131929; --surface3: #1a2235; --border: #1e3058; --text: #d8e8ff; --text-muted:#6a85b0; --accent: #38bdf8; /* ice blue */ --accent2: #818cf8; /* purple */ --accent3: #f472b6; /* pink */ --success: #34d399; --warning: #fbbf24; --danger: #f87171; --glow: rgba(56,189,248,0.25); --font-display: 'Segoe UI', 'Inter', sans-serif; --font-body: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; --font-mono: 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', monospace; } *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } body { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.7; min-height: 100vh; } /* ─── Layout ─── */ .container { max-width: 960px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; } section { padding: 80px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); } h1 { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.2rem); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.1; } h2 { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 3vw, 2rem); font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 24px; color: var(--accent); } h3 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 10px; color: var(--text); } p { color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 14px; } p strong { color: var(--text); } .label { font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 8px; } /* ─── Hero ─── */ #hero { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; padding: 60px 24px; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 40%, rgba(56,189,248,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, rgba(129,140,248,0.06) 0%, transparent 60%), var(--bg); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } #hero::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: url("data:image/svg+x
